headline: Should KKR’s (KKR) Flora Sale and UP Education Bid Prompt a Portfolio Rethink for Investors?
summary: In late April 2026, reports indicated that KKR & Co. Inc. began exploring a potential US$10 billion sale of Flora Food Group, its margarine and spreads business acquired from Unilever in 2017, while simultaneously advancing in the bidding for Australia-based tertiary education provider UP Education in a process expected to exceed US$1 billion. At the same time, KKR absorbed an earnings miss driven by weaker transaction fees and lower investment income, even as fundraising exceeded forecasts...
